metadata.title: Negro Leagues Travel Corridor Danger Scores (Full)
metadata.description: Danger scores for every city-pair travel corridor observed in the 1936-1948 Negro Leagues schedule. Each corridor is analyzed by counting documented sundown towns within 5 miles of the great-circle route between cities.

methodology.normalization: Weighted town count per 100 route miles, scaled to 0-1 (8.0 weighted towns per 100mi = 1.0)
methodology.upper_bound: Danger score multiplied by 2.5x to estimate undocumented sundown towns, capped at 1.0
methodology.route_geometry: Great-circle distance between city pairs. Period-accurate road routing would increase distances.

source.game_locations: Seamheads Negro Leagues Database, SABR Ballparks Database
